学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; stable at 10th place (Top 10) in the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026, with an extremely high university level, maintaining strong attraction for high-scoring candidates; no reputation incidents recorded for Xi'an Jiaotong University during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle; Douyin popularity ranking 24th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of 1.84 million, stable and slightly hot in recent years; no signs of admission gaps in historical filing anomaly records, indicating stable application psychology; 4 A+ disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 7 A disciplines (Mechanics, Business Administration, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Marxist Theory), with a total of 13 A- and above, top national engineering strength, and strong attraction of flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Computer Science for candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity: Computer Science highly recommended, Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended, all flagship directions of Xi'an Jiaotong University, with continuously rising application heat; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, the only C9 university in the province, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment (1166 in Physics Category in 2025 accounting for a large proportion of national enrollment), strong willingness of provincial candidates to apply, and obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.2%), significant increase in provincial candidate numbers (+19.7%), extremely high university level with stable and slightly hot popularity, and continued high heat of flagship majors, the intensified competition from the expanded candidate pool outweighs the easing effect of the expansion. It is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline of 3291 (competition intensifies, harder to enter). 历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Shaanxi Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 5623 (planned enrollment 394), 2022: 19522 (planned enrollment 354), 2023: 27577 (planned enrollment 370), 2024: 11116 (planned enrollment 308), 2025: 10415 (planned enrollment 297). Rankings continued to decline significantly from 2021 to 2023, then rebounded strongly to 11116 in 2024, and further rose to 10415 in 2025, showing a clear recovery trend in the past two years. The 2026 medical enrollment plan is 294, a slight decrease of 3 from 297 in 2025, a reduction of about 1%, which will have a minor upward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university under the 985 Project and 211 Project, and is selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Category A), located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province. As a member of the C9 League, the university has strong comprehensive strength. Its medical department has a long history and enjoys a very high reputation in the northwest region and even nationwide, making it one of the top target institutions for many Shaanxi candidates applying for medical majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising continuously, with core medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical department is located in the provincial capital Xi'an, with obvious geographical advantages. Its enrollment scale in the province remains around 300, making it a major medical enrollment institution in the province. As society's attention to the medical and health field continues to increase, the attractiveness of medical majors is steadily growing, and it is expected that the application enthusiasm will remain high in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the calculation of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in 2026 will be 10267, slightly higher than in 2025 (ranking number decreases), reflecting the combined impact of the continuously rising popularity of medical majors and a slight reduction in enrollment. The predicted admission range is 9767 to 10767.
